routing.task_classification: Analyze this request and classify it into one of these categories: code_generation, refactoring, testing, bug_detection, documentation, migration, devops, release. Request: {{request}}
routing.complexity_assessment: Assess the complexity of this task on a scale of 1-10. Consider: code size, number of dependencies, required domain knowledge. Task: {{task}}

code_generator.default: Generate {{language}} code that accomplishes: {{description}}. Follow best practices, include error handling, and add appropriate comments.

refactoring.analyze:
Analyze this {{language}} code for refactoring opportunities. Identify code smells, violations of SOLID principles, and suggest improvements:
{{code}}
refactoring.apply:
Refactor this code to improve {{focus_area}} while maintaining functionality:
{{code}}

testing.generate_unit_tests:
Write comprehensive unit tests for this {{language}} code using {{framework}}. Include edge cases, error scenarios, and achieve at least {{coverage}}% coverage:
{{code}}

bug_detection.security_scan:
Scan this {{language}} code for security vulnerabilities including: SQL injection, XSS, CSRF, hardcoded credentials, insecure cryptography:
{{code}}
bug_detection.performance_analysis:
Identify performance bottlenecks in this code. Look for: O(n²) operations, unnecessary allocations, memory leaks, inefficient algorithms:
{{code}}
bug_detection.logic_errors:
Find logical errors and potential bugs in this code. Check for: null pointer issues, off-by-one errors, race conditions, incorrect assumptions:
{{code}}

documentation.api_docs:
Generate API documentation for this {{language}} module. Include: function signatures, parameter descriptions, return values, exceptions, and usage examples:
{{code}}
documentation.readme:
Create a README.md for this project. Include: project description, installation instructions, usage examples, configuration options, and contribution guidelines.
Project info: {{project_info}}
documentation.changelog:
Generate a changelog entry for version {{version}} based on these changes:
{{changes}}

migration.version_upgrade: Create a plan for upgrading from version {{from_version}} to {{to_version}}. List all required steps, potential breaking changes, and rollback procedures.

devops.dockerfile: Generate a production-ready Dockerfile for a {{app_type}} application. Include: multi-stage build, security best practices, health checks, and minimal image size.
devops.k8s_manifest: Create Kubernetes manifests for deploying this service. Include: Deployment, Service, ConfigMap, and Ingress resources. Replicas: {{replicas}}, Memory: {{memory}}, CPU: {{cpu}}
devops.ci_pipeline: Generate a CI/CD pipeline configuration for {{provider}}. Include stages for: linting, testing, building, and deployment.

release.release_notes:
Generate release notes for version {{version}}. Categorize changes into: New Features, Bug Fixes, Improvements, Breaking Changes.
Commits: {{commits}}
release.validation_checklist: Create a pre-release validation checklist for this {{app_type}} application. Include: tests, documentation, security scans, performance benchmarks.
